package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepeatedSameQueryTemplateSameFunction() string {
    ruleID := "repeated_same_query_template_same_function"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "The same query template executed multiple times in one function."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
